requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Burkina Faso Local Fire Authority, IEC 62933-5-1, and Donor/Lender Fire-Safety Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——布基纳法索地方消防机关、IEC 62933-5-1及捐助方/贷款方消防安全要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——布吉納法索地方消防機關、IEC 62933-5-1及捐助方/貸款方消防安全要求

summary.en: Burkina Faso does not have a single national BESS fire-safety installation code equivalent to NFPA 855 or a comparable confirmed mandatory standard for stationary energy storage systems as of the dataset date. Fire safety for building and industrial installations in Burkina Faso falls under the jurisdiction of local fire and civil protection authorities (Direction Générale de la Protection Civile — DGPC, operating under the Ministry of Security/Territorial Administration) in conjunction with building permit requirements issued at the municipal level. For utility-scale BESS projects — which are predominantly donor-financed (World Bank, AFD, AfDB) or developed as IPPs — the applicable fire-safety standards are defined in the project specification by the project owner, EPC contractor, and lender's independent engineer, and typically reference IEC 62933-5-1:2024 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation) and IEC 62619 for system-level and cell-level fire and thermal-runaway risk management. NFPA 855 may also be referenced in lender or project-owner specifications where the project team applies international best practice for BESS fire safety. High ambient temperatures (≥45 °C) in Burkina Faso's Sahel environment elevate thermal-runaway risk relative to temperate-climate deployments and must be explicitly addressed in the fire-safety design. No publicly accessible DGPC technical specification specifically for BESS fire-safety installation has been confirmed as of the dataset date.
summary.zh: 截至本数据集日期，布基纳法索尚无相当于NFPA 855的单一国家BESS消防安全安装规范，也无针对固定式储能系统的经确认同等强制性标准。布基纳法索建筑和工业装置的消防安全由地方消防和民事保护机关（民事保护总局——DGPC，隶属安全/领土行政部）负责，结合市政层面签发的建筑许可证要求。对于公用事业规模BESS项目——主要为捐助方资助（世界银行、AFD、非开行）或以IPP形式开发——适用消防安全标准由项目业主、EPC承包商和贷款方独立工程师在项目规格中规定，通常引用IEC 62933-5-1:2024（储能系统——安全考量——危害识别、风险评估和风险缓解）和IEC 62619用于系统级和电芯级火灾及热失控风险管理。若项目团队采用BESS消防安全国际最佳实践，贷款方或项目业主规格中也可能引用NFPA 855。布基纳法索萨赫勒环境的高环境温度（≥45 °C）相比温带气候部署提升了热失控风险，须在消防安全设计中明确加以解决。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认DGPC公开发布专门针对BESS消防安全安装的技术规格。
summary.zht: 截至本數據集日期，布吉納法索尚無相當於NFPA 855的單一國家BESS消防安全安裝規範，也無針對固定式儲能系統的經確認同等強制性標準。布吉納法索建築和工業裝置的消防安全由地方消防和民事保護機關（民事保護總局——DGPC，隸屬安全/領土行政部）負責，結合市政層面簽發的建築許可證要求。對於公用事業規模BESS項目——主要為捐助方資助（世界銀行、AFD、非開行）或以IPP形式開發——適用消防安全標準由項目業主、EPC承包商和貸款方獨立工程師在項目規格中規定，通常引用IEC 62933-5-1:2024（儲能系統——安全考量——危害識別、風險評估和風險緩解）和IEC 62619用於系統級和電芯級火災及熱失控風險管理。若項目團隊採用BESS消防安全國際最佳實踐，貸款方或項目業主規格中也可能引用NFPA 855。布吉納法索薩赫勒環境的高環境溫度（≥45 °C）相比溫帶氣候部署提升了熱失控風險，須在消防安全設計中明確加以解決。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認DGPC公開發布專門針對BESS消防安全安裝的技術規格。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level fire and safety standard expected in donor-funded project specifications)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (cell/module level thermal-runaway risk evidence)

NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (may be referenced by project-owner or lender specifications applying international best practice; no confirmed Burkina Faso national adoption as of dataset date)

Direction Générale de la Protection Civile (DGPC) — Burkina Faso national civil protection authority with jurisdiction over fire safety for industrial and commercial installations; project-level fire safety submissions required (verify current requirements directly with DGPC)
Building permit requirements — municipal-level fire safety review for fixed installations

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety and thermal-management provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36558-2023 covers system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority (消防局) approval procedures under the Fire Prevention Law and Construction Law. China's BESS product test environment is temperate (25 °C ±2 °C laboratory standard), and standard Chinese fire-safety approvals do not account for the elevated thermal-runaway risk associated with sustained Sahel ambient temperatures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Burkina Faso's DGPC or lender independent engineers as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-1 or NFPA 855 requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC 62933-5-1-aligned hazard analysis and high-ambient-temperature thermal-runaway propagation design for Burkina Faso project review.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全和热管理规定。GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国项目级消防审查依据《消防法》和《建筑法》的地方消防局审批程序管控。中国BESS产品测试环境为温带（实验室标准25 °C ±2 °C），标准中国消防审批不考虑萨赫勒持续高环境温度相关的热失控风险升高。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被布基纳法索DGPC或贷款方独立工程师认可为等同于IEC 62933-5-1或NFPA 855要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在布基纳法索项目审查中补充符合IEC 62933-5-1的危害分析和高环境温度热失控蔓延设计。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全和熱管理規定。GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國項目級消防審查依據《消防法》和《建築法》的地方消防局審批程序管控。中國BESS產品測試環境為溫帶（實驗室標準25 °C ±2 °C），標準中國消防審批不考慮薩赫勒持續高環境溫度相關的熱失控風險升高。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被布吉納法索DGPC或貸款方獨立工程師認可為等同於IEC 62933-5-1或NFPA 855要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在布吉納法索項目審查中補充符合IEC 62933-5-1的危害分析和高環境溫度熱失控蔓延設計。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: There is no single confirmed Burkina Faso national BESS fire-safety installation code; fire-safety requirements are project-defined (by lender, project owner, and EPC) and municipality/DGPC-reviewed. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy IEC 62933-5-1 or NFPA 855 requirements expected by lender independent engineers and project owners in Burkina Faso. Specific gaps: (a) confirm the applicable fire-safety standard with the project owner, lender independent engineer, and DGPC before design is finalised — IEC 62933-5-1 hazard analysis is the expected baseline for donor-funded projects; (b) prepare a thermal-runaway propagation analysis specific to the proposed cell chemistry and module configuration at ≥45 °C ambient — standard Chinese test data obtained at 25 °C is not directly applicable; (c) design enclosure ventilation and suppression systems for Burkina Faso's high-ambient-temperature and high-dust conditions; (d) ensure relevant equipment (gas detection, suppression systems) is certified by an internationally recognised body acceptable to the lender (UL, FM Global, Bureau Veritas, DNV, SGS); (e) submit fire-safety design to DGPC and obtain any required municipal building or fire-safety permits before installation commences.
gap.zh: 差距：布基纳法索尚无经确认的单一国家BESS消防安全安装规范；消防安全要求由项目定义（贷款方、项目业主和EPC）并经市政/DGPC审查。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足布基纳法索贷款方独立工程师和项目业主所预期的IEC 62933-5-1或NFPA 855要求。具体差距：（a）在设计最终确定前与项目业主、贷款方独立工程师和DGPC确认适用消防安全标准——IEC 62933-5-1危害分析是捐助方资助项目的预期基准；（b）准备针对所提议电芯化学体系和模组配置在环境温度≥45 °C下的热失控蔓延分析——在25 °C下取得的标准中国测试数据不可直接适用；（c）针对布基纳法索高环境温度和高粉尘条件设计机箱通风和抑制系统；（d）确保相关设备（气体探测、抑制系统）经贷款方可接受的国际认可机构（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas、DNV、SGS）认证；（e）在安装开始前向DGPC提交消防安全设计并取得任何所需的市政建筑或消防安全许可。
gap.zht: 差距：布吉納法索尚無經確認的單一國家BESS消防安全安裝規範；消防安全要求由項目定義（貸款方、項目業主和EPC）並經市政/DGPC審查。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足布吉納法索貸款方獨立工程師和項目業主所預期的IEC 62933-5-1或NFPA 855要求。具體差距：（a）在設計最終確定前與項目業主、貸款方獨立工程師和DGPC確認適用消防安全標準——IEC 62933-5-1危害分析是捐助方資助項目的預期基準；（b）準備針對所提議電芯化學體系和模組配置在環境溫度≥45 °C下的熱失控蔓延分析——在25 °C下取得的標準中國測試數據不可直接適用；（c）針對布吉納法索高環境溫度和高粉塵條件設計機箱通風和抑制系統；（d）確保相關設備（氣體探測、抑制系統）經貸款方可接受的國際認可機構（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas、DNV、SGS）認證；（e）在安裝開始前向DGPC提交消防安全設計並取得任何所需的市政建築或消防安全許可。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at project and municipal level — DGPC fire safety review and building permit required for commercial and industrial installations; IEC 62933-5-1 compliance is a practical mandatory gate for donor-funded and lender-financed BESS projects; no confirmed national BESS fire-safety installation code equivalent to NFPA 855 as of dataset date — verify directly with DGPC and project lender
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements; Chinese approvals not transferable to Burkina Faso

source.publisher: Gouvernement du Burkina Faso — Direction Générale de la Protection Civile (DGPC) operates under Ministry of Security / Territorial Administration

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] There is no confirmed single national BESS fire-safety installation code in Burkina Faso as of the dataset date. Fire-safety requirements for grid-scale BESS are project-defined by lender, project owner, and EPC, with IEC 62933-5-1 as the expected baseline for donor-funded projects; DGPC and municipal building permits are required for installation. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy IEC 62933-5-1 or NFPA 855. A Burkina Faso-specific critical requirement beyond the Qatar comparison is the need to design and validate fire-safety systems specifically for Sahel high-ambient (≥45 °C) thermal-runaway risk — this cannot be substituted by Chinese standard-temperature test data. Engage the project lender's independent engineer and DGPC at the earliest project stage.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，布基纳法索尚无经确认的单一国家BESS消防安全安装规范。电网规模BESS的消防安全要求由贷款方、项目业主和EPC项目定义，IEC 62933-5-1是捐助方资助项目的预期基准；安装须取得DGPC和市政建筑许可。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足IEC 62933-5-1或NFPA 855。超出卡塔尔对比的布基纳法索特有关键要求是需要专门针对萨赫勒高环境温度（≥45 °C）热失控风险设计和验证消防安全系统——不能以中国标准温度测试数据替代。应在项目最早阶段与项目贷款方独立工程师和DGPC接触。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，布吉納法索尚無經確認的單一國家BESS消防安全安裝規範。電網規模BESS的消防安全要求由貸款方、項目業主和EPC項目定義，IEC 62933-5-1是捐助方資助項目的預期基準；安裝須取得DGPC和市政建築許可。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足IEC 62933-5-1或NFPA 855。超出卡達對比的布吉納法索特有關鍵要求是需要專門針對薩赫勒高環境溫度（≥45 °C）熱失控風險設計和驗證消防安全系統——不能以中國標準溫度測試數據替代。應在項目最早階段與項目貸款方獨立工程師和DGPC接觸。
